Set Foot Lock Offsets

Get Curve Value
La destinazione è Istanza animazione
Only update values if FootIK curve has a weight.
nodes.comment: Only update values if FootIK curve has a weight.

nodes.title: Step 1: Set Local FootLock Curve value
nodes.comment: Step 1: Set Local FootLock Curve value

nodes.title: Step 2: Only update the FootLock Alpha if the new value is less than the current, or it equals 1. This makes it so that the foot can only blend out of the locked position or lock to a new position, and never blend in.
nodes.comment: Step 2: Only update the FootLock Alpha if the new value is less than the current, or it equals 1. This makes it so that the foot can only blend out of the locked position or lock to a new position, and never blend in.

nodes.title: Step 3: If the Foot Lock curve equals 1, save the new lock location and rotation in component space.
nodes.comment: Step 3: If the Foot Lock curve equals 1, save the new lock location and rotation in component space.

nodes.title: Step 4: If the Foot Lock Alpha has a weight, update the Foot Lock offsets to keep the foot planted in place while the capsule moves.
nodes.comment: Step 4: If the Foot Lock Alpha has a weight, update the Foot Lock offsets to keep the foot planted in place while the capsule moves.
